popupTriggers.title: Popup Triggers
popupTriggers.subtitle: Choose when the popup should appear

exitIntent.title: Exit Intent
exitIntent.description: Display when visitor attempts to leave the page
exitIntent.footer: Desktop browsers only - requires mouse movement detection

pageViews.title: Page Views
pageViews.description: Show after visiting a specific number of pages
pageViews.footer: Counts all page views in current session

viewingTime.title: Viewing Time
viewingTime.description: Display after visitor spends time on the site
viewingTime.footer: Timer resets on page navigation when set to 'current page'

scrollDepth.title: Scroll Depth
scrollDepth.description: Show when visitor scrolls to specific page percentage
scrollDepth.footer: Measured from top of page content

pageClicks.title: Page Clicks
pageClicks.description: Display after visitor clicks elements on page
pageClicks.footer: Any clickable element counts toward total

displayFrequency.title: Display Frequency
displayFrequency.description: Control how often the popup appears to visitors
displayFrequency.newVisitorDescription: A New visitor has not been to your site in the last:
displayFrequency.returningVisitorDescription: A Returning visitor has already been to your site in the last:

targetAudience.title: Target Audience
targetAudience.caption: Based on browser cookies and session data

subHeading.new: A New visitor has not been to your site in the last X days
subHeading.return: A Returning visitor has already been to your site in the last X days

oncePerDay.title: Once per Day
oncePerDay.description: Show popup maximum once every 24 hours

everyXDays.description: Once every few days - show your popup to for every number of days you decide.

everyXVisit.description: Once every few visits - show your popup to for every number of visits you decide.

everyVisit.title: Every Visit
everyVisit.description: Show popup on every website visit

pageTargeting.title: Page Targeting
pageTargeting.subtitle: Specify which pages should display the popup

continueShowing.label: Continue showing popup after conversion
continueShowing.helper: Keep displaying to visitors who already converted

headerSection.title: Advanced Settings
headerSection.subtitle: Configure post-conversion behavior and advanced options
